<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk002.pdf#page=12 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p72 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->


[[File:Band06_chunk002_p012_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p012_img002.jpg|thumb|Dankopfer Freisings]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p73 -->
